one_line: A male vocalist sings a melancholic blues tune about dying dreams and how he wants to go, accompanied by a clean electric guitar with heavy tremolo and some harmonica.

title: The Black Sheep
one_line: A high-energy, distorted rock track with a bluesy and playful feel, featuring a dominant electric guitar with whammy bar effects, backed by a driving drum beat and bass.

title: the river must flow
one_line: A peaceful and reflective classical guitar piece featuring a gentle arpeggiated melody.

title: Tigrrr's Song
one_line: A mellow acoustic guitar solo featuring bluesy licks and jazz-infused melodies with a reflective feel.

title: Track 149
one_line: A smooth and laid-back saxophone solo with a gentle, relaxing melody suitable for a lounge or chill-out setting.

title: Wave to Frank
one_line: A melancholic electric guitar melody builds dynamically with rock drum beats and a pulsing bassline into an expressive, slightly bluesy rock instrumental.

title: Fuck Everything
one_line: A cacophony of distorted electronic sounds, reminiscent of a malfunctioning robot orchestra, creates a chaotic and unsettling sonic landscape with an industrial edge.

title: it's gonna go dark
one_line: A gentle acoustic guitar melody creates a relaxed and reflective atmosphere, with occasional ambient sounds of wind, forming a mellow instrumental folk piece.

title: It's time
one_line: A sinister and drawn-out drone with occasional high-pitched swells creates a truly unsettling atmosphere perfect for horror or suspense.

title: Moeg vir jou kak
one_line: A fingerpicked acoustic guitar plays a melancholic and thoughtful tune, evoking a reflective mood.

title: The Mood Stabilizing Depressant Circus
one_line: This track features chaotic, high-energy metal music with a dark and aggressive mood, characterized by fast-paced riffs, shredding solos, and a powerful drum beat, creating an intense and unsettling atmosphere.

title: Trip to the Circus
one_line: This track features experimental electronic noise with a harsh, high-pitched, and distorted soundscape, building in intensity and creating an unsettling, industrial atmosphere.

title: vervreem

title: Golden Hair

title: If (Pink Floyd Cover)
key_lyric: If I were a good man, I'd talk to you more often than I can.
one_line: A melancholic male voice reflects on regrets and possibilities, accompanied by tenderly plucked acoustic guitar.

title: If You Go Away
key_lyric: If you go away on this summer day, then you might as well take the sun away.
one_line: A somber folk song features a male vocalist and acoustic guitar, reflecting on the profound sadness of a loved one leaving, comparing their departure to the absence of the sun and the end of cherished memories.

title: You've got to hide your love away
key_lyric: Hey, you've got to hide your love away
one_line: A melancholic male voice sings a folk song, accompanied by acoustic guitar, about the pain of having to hide one's love away from a judgmental world.

title: Aisle Seat Mix 1
key_lyric: I don't know that I can know

title: Mix 1.2

one_line: This is a folk rock song with a strong sense of resilience, featuring a male vocalist and electric guitar, with an expanding soundscape and increasing intensity towards the end.

title: Mix Final 1.1
key_lyric: Fight the stormy weather
one_line: A dynamic folk-rock track that journeys from melancholic reflection through ambient introspection to a powerful, defiant climax against life's storms.

title: Mixdown
one_line: A melancholic acoustic guitar solo with a reflective and slightly tense mood, marked by slow strumming and finger-picking.

title: Mixdown 1 - TMTAOT
key_lyric: And the lights will shine when you won't die

title: Realise 1
